purpose: Per-group leave cleanup fan-out (pure impl, zero context/marmot-ts imports). This story adds one more injected clear* dependency — clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup — so that leaving a group also clears that group's pending-direct-invite markers (AC-MARKER-9's leave-fan-out half), alongside the pre-existing clearMemberProfiles/clearPendingJoinRequestsForGroup/clearInviteLinksForGroup/clearInviteExpiries siblings.

public_api.name: leaveGroupImpl
public_api.signature: (deps: Deps, groupId: string, selfPubkeyHex: string) => Promise<boolean>
public_api.description: Unchanged signature. Deps now includes clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup: (groupId: string) => Promise<void>, invoked unconditionally in the purge sequence alongside the other leak-fixing clears, scoped to exactly the groupId being left.

dependencies_allowed: injected Deps functions only for all storage/context side effects (unchanged boundary — clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup arrives as an injected function, matching the existing clearMemberProfiles/clearInviteLinksForGroup shape; this file does not import pendingDirectInviteStorage.ts directly, per VQ-S3-002)
dependencies_forbidden: @internet-privacy/marmot-ts (never imported directly; getGroupMembers arrives via Deps)
app/src/lib/marmot/pendingDirectInviteStorage.ts (the concrete store import belongs at the MarmotContext.tsx Deps-wiring site, not in this pure-impl file)
